name: Nanaimo Bars (Canadian)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter and stir in the cocoa and sugar.
2. Add 1 beaten egg with the vanilla to the melted butter. Stir in the custard and milk until smooth.
3. Mix in the Graham Wafers Crumbs and press into the bottom of a lightly greased 9x9 inch pan.
4. Place in the refrigerator.
5. For the filling, beat together icing sugar, butter, and custard (add milk as needed). Spread over the mixture in the pan.
6. Return to the refrigerator until set.
7. Melt chocolate and butter with vanilla in a saucepan. Stir quickly for a smooth, even layer.
8. Spread over the filling and return to the refrigerator.
9. Once set, cut into bars. Refrigerate before serving.
